content.explanation:
**Make / Get — Causative Verbs (किसी से कुछ करवाना):**

Causative verbs बताते हैं कि कोई person किसी **दूसरे से** कुछ **करवाता** है।

**MAKE (force करना / मजबूर करना):**
Structure: Make + object + V1 (base verb)
🇮🇳 उसने मुझे हँसाया।
🇬🇧 She **made me laugh**.

🇮🇳 Teacher ने बच्चों को दौड़ाया।
🇬🇧 The teacher **made** the children **run**.

**GET (persuade करना / काम करवाना — more informal):**
Structure: Get + object + to + V1
🇮🇳 उसने mechanic से गाड़ी ठीक करवाई।
🇬🇧 She **got** the mechanic **to fix** the car.

🇮🇳 मैंने बच्चे से homework करवाया।
🇬🇧 I **got** the child **to do** the homework.

**HAVE (professional service करवाना):**
Structure: Have + object + V3 (passive sense)
🇬🇧 I **had** my hair **cut**. (haircut करवाया)
🇬🇧 She **had** the report **written**. (report लिखवाई)
rules: Make + object + V1 (base) = force/compel someone to do something
Get + object + to + V1 = persuade/arrange for someone to do something
Have + object + V3 = arrange a service (professional context)
Let + object + V1 = allow someone to do something (Day 13)
Make is stronger (force); Get is gentler (persuade/arrange)
Make can also mean "create": make a cake, make a decision
Get can also mean "obtain/receive": get a job, get a message
content.memoryTrick:
**MAKE = Force 💪, GET = Ask/Arrange 🤝, HAVE = Hire/Service 🔧**
Make + V1 (no to) | Get + TO + V1 | Have + V3
Yaad rakho: Make = forceful (no to); Get = gentle with TO!

examples.hindi: Boss ने उसे दोबारा काम करवाया।
examples.english: The boss made him redo the work.

examples.hindi: उसने doctor को time पर बुलवा लिया।
examples.english: She got the doctor to come on time.

examples.hindi: माँ ने बच्चों से कमरा साफ करवाया।
examples.english: Mother made the children clean the room.

mistakes.wrong: He got me repair the bike.
mistakes.correct: He got me to repair the bike.
mistakes.why: Get + object + TO + V1 ('to' is required)

speakingTips: Daily life में use करो: 'I got my shoes polished.' / 'She made me wait for an hour!'
Professional: 'I had the report proofread before sending.'
Story telling: 'The teacher made the entire class repeat the poem three times.'

vocabulary.example: She persuaded me to join the club.
The rules compel employees to be on time.
I authorized the team to proceed.
He delegated the work to his assistant.
The teacher assigned homework to students.
We hired a plumber to fix the pipe.

practice.hindi: उसने मुझे रोने पर मजबूर किया।
alternatives: he caused me to cry.

practice.hindi: माँ ने मुझे सब्ज़ियाँ खाने पर मजबूर किया।
alternatives: mom made me have vegetables.

practice.hindi: उस फिल्म ने मुझे हँसाया।
alternatives: the film made me burst out laughing.

practice.hindi: टीचर ने सबको कक्षा के बाद रुकाया।
practice.english: The teacher made everyone stay after class.
alternatives: the teacher made students stay back.

practice.hindi: इस खबर ने मुझे खुश कर दिया।
alternatives: the news made me feel happy.

practice.hindi: वह मुझे गुस्सा कर देती है।
alternatives: she makes me feel angry.

practice.hindi: उसने मुझे इंतज़ार करवाया।
alternatives: he kept me waiting.

practice.hindi: किताब ने मुझे बहुत सोचने पर मजबूर किया।
practice.english: The book made me think a lot.
alternatives: that book made me reflect deeply.

practice.hindi: मैंने उससे रिपोर्ट ठीक करवाई।
practice.english: I got him to fix the report.
alternatives: i had him correct the report.

practice.hindi: वह उसे समझाने में सफल रही।
alternatives: she managed to get him to understand.

practice.hindi: मुझे गाड़ी ठीक करवानी है।
practice.english: I need to get my car repaired.
alternatives: i want to get the car fixed.

practice.hindi: उसने बाल कटवाए।
alternatives: he had his hair cut.

practice.hindi: मुझे अपना फोन ठीक करवाना है।
practice.english: I need to get my phone repaired.
alternatives: i want to get my phone fixed.

practice.hindi: उसने घर पेंट करवाया।
alternatives: she had her house painted.

practice.hindi: मैंने उसे खाना बनवाया।
practice.english: I got her to cook food.
alternatives: i made her cook the food.

practice.hindi: उसने मुझे यह काम करने पर मजबूर किया।
practice.english: He made me do this work.
alternatives: he forced me to do this work.

practice.hindi: मैंने उसे काम करने के लिए मना लिया।
practice.english: I got him to do the work.
alternatives: i persuaded him to work.

practice.hindi: क्या तुमने अपना होमवर्क करवाया?
practice.english: Did you get your homework done?
alternatives: have you got your homework finished?

practice.hindi: वह हमेशा मुझे मुस्कुराने पर मजबूर करती है।
alternatives: she always brings a smile to my face.

practice.hindi: उसने कपड़े धुलवाए।
alternatives: she had her clothes laundered.

practice.hindi: यह गाना मुझे खुश कर देता है।
alternatives: this song makes me feel good.

practice.hindi: मैं उसे यह सच मनवाने में कामयाब हुआ।
practice.english: I managed to get him to accept the truth.
alternatives: i got him to believe the truth.

practice.hindi: उसकी बातों ने मुझे सोचने पर मजबूर किया।
alternatives: what he said made me think.

practice.hindi: मुझे अपना कमरा साफ़ करवाना है।
practice.english: I need to get my room cleaned.
alternatives: i want to get my room tidied up.

practice.hindi: उसने मुझे यह किताब पढ़ने के लिए मना लिया।
practice.english: She got me to read this book.
alternatives: she convinced me to read this book.
